PROP-01b-partial-inv-007.text: _call performs arbitrary external call with no gas limit; a malicious target can consume all remaining gas.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-007.assertion: forall _call(target, data): gasLeft after call >= MIN_GAS_THRESHOLD for remaining execution

locations.note: line 27: target.call(data) with no gas stipend — unbounded gas forwarding to arbitrary target
